# init(_:)

**Initializer**

Convert a [doc://com.apple.LightweightCodeRequirements/documentation/LightweightCodeRequirements/OnDiskCodeRequirement] to a [doc://com.apple.LightweightCodeRequirements/documentation/LightweightCodeRequirements/LaunchCodeRequirement] if possible.

## Declaration

```swift
init(_ onDiskRequirement: OnDiskCodeRequirement) throws
```

## Discussion

Conversion will fail if the [doc://com.apple.LightweightCodeRequirements/documentation/LightweightCodeRequirements/OnDiskCodeRequirement] contains a constraint that cannot be converted to [doc://com.apple.LightweightCodeRequirements/documentation/LightweightCodeRequirements/LaunchConstraint].
